title: Kubernetes API Concepts — resourceVersionparameters in query strings
text:
The
get
,
list
, and
watch
operations support the
resourceVersion
parameter.
From version v1.19, Kubernetes API servers also support the
resourceVersionMatch
parameter on
list
requests.
The API server interprets the
resourceVersion
parameter differently depending
on the operation you request, and on the value of
resourceVersion
. If you set
resourceVersionMatch
then this also affects the way matching happens.
